stages.concept:
# Unit 026: 대명사 it - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **대명사 it**의 다양한 쓰임에 대해 배워볼까요?

> **It** is raining outside.
> 밖에 비가 오고 있다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 대명사 it은 앞에서 언급한 **사물을 가리킬 때** 쓰여요.

> I bought a new book. **It** is very interesting.
> 나는 새 책을 샀다. 그것은 매우 재미있다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 또한 it은 **날씨, 시간, 요일, 날짜, 계절, 거리, 명암** 등을 나타낼 때 주어로 쓰여요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **날씨**를 나타낼 때:

> **It** is sunny today.
> 오늘은 화창하다.

> **It** is raining outside.
> 밖에 비가 오고 있다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **시간**을 나타낼 때:

> **It** is 3 o'clock.
> 3시이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **요일/날짜**를 나타낼 때:

> **It** is Monday today.
> 오늘은 월요일이다.

> **It** is December 25th.
> 12월 25일이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **계절**을 나타낼 때:

> **It** is spring now.
> 지금은 봄이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **거리**를 나타낼 때:

> **It** is 5 kilometers from here to the school.
> 여기서 학교까지 5킬로미터이다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: it은 사물을 가리키는 것 외에도 날씨, 시간, 요일, 거리 등을 나타내는 비인칭 주어로도 쓰이는 거군요!
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 026: 재귀대명사 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
I made this cake (     ) .
보기: myself / himself
> **정답** myself

---

**02.** 보기에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
She looked at (     ) in the mirror.
보기: himself / herself
> **정답** herself

---

**03.** 보기에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
They enjoyed (     ) at the party.
보기: ourselves / themselves
> **정답** themselves

---

**04.** 보기에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
He fixed the bicycle (     ) .
보기: himself / herself
> **정답** himself

---

**05.** 보기에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
We should believe in (     ) .
보기: yourselves / ourselves
> **정답** ourselves

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She taught himself to cook.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** himself → herself

---

**07.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
They painted the wall ourself.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** ourself → themselves

---

**08.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I hurt herself while running.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** herself → myself

---

**09.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
He introduced hisself to the class.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** hisself → himself

---

**10.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
We prepared the food ourselfs.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** ourselfs → ourselves

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
나는 혼자서 숙제를 했다.
I did my homework by .
> **정답** myself

---

**12.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그녀는 스스로 방을 청소했다.
She cleaned her room by .
> **정답** herself

---

**13.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그들은 스스로 음식을 차렸다.
They set the table by .
> **정답** themselves

---

**14.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그는 혼자서 그 문제를 풀었다.
He solved the problem by .
> **정답** himself

---

**15.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
너는 혼자서 그것을 할 수 있니?
Can you do it by (     )
> **정답** yourself

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그녀는 거울 속 자신을 보았다.
herself looked in She
the mirror at
> **정답** She / looked / at / herself / in / the / mirror

---

**17.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
우리는 스스로를 믿어야 한다.
believe We ourselves should in
> **정답** We / should / believe / in / ourselves

---

**18.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그 사장님이 직접 전화했다.
himself called The boss
> **정답** The / boss / himself / called

---

**19.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
나의 여동생은 종이에 베였다.
My sister cut herself
on paper.
> **정답** My / sister / cut / herself / on / paper.

---

**20.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
아이들은 스스로 교실을 정리했다.
The children organized
themselves. the classroom
> **정답** The children / organized / the classroom / themselves.
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 026: 대명사 It  비인칭 주어 It - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 it의 쓰임이 나머지와 다른 것을 고르시오.
It is not Tom's pencil case.
It was 2 o' clock when I arrived at the airport.
It is quite cold and windy outside.
It is dark here. Please turn on the light.
> **정답** It is not Tom's pencil case.

---

**02.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 it의 쓰임이 나머지와 다른 것을 고르시오.
It is twenty past twelve now.
It has its name tag on the back.
It will be my sister's birthday present.
It is my new tablet.
> **정답** It is twenty past twelve now.

---

**03.** 다음 우리말과 일치하도록 문장을 쓸 때 사용하지 않는
단어를 고르시오.
벌써 세시야.
is
대명사 It
비인칭 주어 It
3 o' clock
> **정답** 대명사 It

---

**04.** 다음 우리말과 일치하도록 문장을 쓸 때 사용하지 않는
단어를 고르시오.
여기서 거기까지 약 50분 걸려.
대명사 It
takes
about 50 minutes
비인칭 주어 It
> **정답** 대명사 It

---

**05.** 다음 우리말과 일치하도록 문장을 쓸 때 사용하지 않는
단어를 고르시오.
그것은 공평한 경기가 아니었어.
대명사 It
a fair game.
비인칭 주어 It
wasn't
> **정답** 비인칭 주어 It

---

**06.** 다음 문장의 it과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
It is March 5th.
You can use it if you want.
It is about 3 kilometers from your house.
She likes it, because it is blue.
Please put it back in my bag after class.
> **정답** It is about 3 kilometers from your house.

---

**07.** 다음 문장의 it과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
She wrote it in Korean.
It was his mistake.
It was time to go to sleep.
It is Tuesday afternoon.
It was too dark at night.
> **정답** It was his mistake.

---

**08.** 아래 문장에서 it 의 쓰임을 표시하시오.
대명사 it  비인칭 주어 it
It was Sunday and it was
raining outside. So, they watched
a movie at home, but it was
not exciting.
> **정답**  It was Sunday and it was raining outside. So, they watched a movie at home, but it was not exciting.

---

**09.** 아래 문장에서 it 의 쓰임을 표시하시오.
대명사 it  비인칭 주어 it
I lost my bag yesterday. I
left it on the bus. I can 't
go out without it today,
because it is rainy outside.
> **정답**  I lost my bag yesterday. I left it on the bus. I can
't go out without it today,
because it is rainy outside.

---

**10.** 아래 문장에서 it 의 쓰임을 표시하시오.
대명사 it  비인칭 주어 it
It is spring, my favorite season.
I like spring because it is not
too hot and not too cold.
> **정답**  It is spring, my favorite season. I like spring because it is not too hot and not too cold.

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법에 맞지 않는 문장을 고르시오.
That car is not my dad's. It's my sister's.
Amy looked at the clock. This was almost 11
p.m.
I want to have a hamster. It is very cute.
This jacket is too big for me. I cannot wear it.
> **정답** Amy looked at the clock. This was almost 11 p.m.

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법에 맞지 않는 문장을 고르시오.
The show was boring, so I didn't watch it.
It is becoming dark, so I am scared.
It took me an hour to clean my room.
She has four dogs, and likes to spend time with
it.
> **정답** She has four dogs, and likes to spend time with it.

---

**13.** 다음 주어진 문장의 it와 쓰임이 같은 것을 모두 고르시오.
[2개]
It is getting dark outside, and it will rain soon.
Because it is sunny and warm, we will go on a
trip.
The teacher wrote something on the board,
but I couldn't see it.
It took only thirty minutes to go to the dentist.
She asked for a new toy and her mom
promised to buy it.
> **정답** Because it is sunny and warm, we will go on a trip., It took only thirty minutes to go to the dentist.

---

**14.** 다음 주어진 문장의 it와 쓰임이 같은 것을 모두 고르시오.
[2개]
Mom bought a new blender, but it is not
working.
Soon, it will be winter, my favorite season.
There was a cute little cat. Everyone was
looking at it.
We made some bread, but we didn't want to
eat it.
It is almost 10 o' clock in the morning but my
brother is still sleeping.
> **정답** There was a cute little cat. Everyone was looking at it., We made some bread, but we didn't want to eat it.

---

**15.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 it의 쓰임이 나머지와 다른 것을 고르시오.
It will be sunny and warm tomorrow.
My dad bought me a cap. But I
lost it at school.
It was bad day today, because my friend and I
had an argument.
It is getting darker and darker.
> **정답** My dad bought me a cap. But I lost it at school.

---

**16.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Is this four o ' clock now?
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** this → it

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
That was cloudy yesterday.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** That → It

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 it 의 쓰임을 표시하시오.
대명사 it  비인칭 주어 it
It was almost summer, so it
was getting hotter. Jake went
out to buy ice cream. He
bought a cup of vanilla ice
cream. It was very tasty.
He liked it.
> **정답**  It was almost summer, so it was getting hotter. Jake went out to buy ice cream. He bought a cup of vanilla ice cream. It was very tasty. He liked it.

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 it 의 쓰임을 표시하시오.
대명사 it  비인칭 주어 1
It is Sunday afternoon. I am
standing on the balcony of the
living room. It is my favorite
place in my house. I
sometimes drink tea there
when it rains.
> **정답**  It is Sunday afternoon. I am standing on the balcony of the living room. It is my favorite place in my house. I sometimes drink tea there when it rains.

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
[2개]
This is Saturday, so my family planned
to go on a trip. We made a big sandwich for lunch. We
put cheese and ham in that . When we were
ready, it rained. So we stayed home.
> **정답** It is, it, it
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 026 대명사 It  비인칭 주어 It중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 다음 그림을 보고, 문장을 완성하시오. (필요시 단어를

추가할 것)
be, half past ten
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .

**02.** 다음 그림을 보고, 문장을 완성하시오. (필요시 단어를
![그림](public/images/units/026_desc_01.webp)
추가할 것)
be, very slippery
The floor was wet, and  (     )   (     )   (     )  
.
정답 it, was, very, slippery

---

**03.** 다음 그림을 보고, 문장을 완성하시오. (필요시 단어를
![그림](public/images/units/026_desc_01.webp)
추가할 것)
be, very hot
  (     )   (     )   (     )  in the summer.
정답 It, is, very, hot

---

**04.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오. (필요시 단어를 추가할 것)
가방이 너무 비싸다, 그래서 그녀는 그것을 사지 않았다.
힌트 (     ) buy
The bag was very expensive, so she  (     )  
.
정답 didn't, buy, it

**05.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오. (필요시 단어를 추가할 것)
Tom의 집은 여기에서부터 40 마일이다.
힌트 (     ) forty miles
  (     )   (     )   (     )  from here to Tom's
house.
정답 It, is, forty, miles

---

**06.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오. (필요시 단어를 추가할 것)
오늘은 수요일이고, 수학 시험이 있다.
힌트 (     ) be, Wednesday
  (     )   (     )  today, and I have a math
test.
정답 It, is, Wednesday

---

**07.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오. (필요시 단어를 추가할 것)
June 5th
A: When is your birthday?
B:  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 It, is, June, 5th

---

**08.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오. (필요시 단어를 추가할 것)
be, rainy
A: How will the weather be tomorrow?
B:  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  tomorrow.
정답 It, will, be, rainy

---

**09.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오. (필요시 단어를 추가할 것)
3월 12일이다. 내 생일이다.
힌트 (     ) be, March 12th, my birthday
 is  (     )   (     ) .  (     )   (     )  
 today.
정답 It, March, 12th, It, is, my, birthday

---

**10.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오. (필요시 단어를 추가할 것)
그것은 나의 오빠한테 받은 선물이었지만, 난 그것을 내 여
동생에게 주었다.
힌트 (     ) be, a gift
  (     )   (     )   (     )  from my brother, but I
gave  (     )  to my sister.
정답 It, was, a, gift, it

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 026: 대명사 It / 비인칭 주어 It - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 it의 쓰임이 나머지와 다른 것을 고르시오.
It is not Tom's notebook.
It was 3 o' clock when I arrived at the station.
It is quite warm and sunny outside.
It is bright here.
Please turn off the light.
> 정답: It is not Tom's notebook.

---

**02.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 it의 쓰임이 나머지와 다른 것을 고르시오.
It is ten past eleven now.
It has its name tag on the back.
It will be my son's birthday present.
It is my new phone.
> 정답: It is ten past eleven now.

---

**03.** 다음 우리말과 일치하도록 문장을 쓸 때 사용하지 않는 단어를 고르시오.
벌써 네시야. is 대명사 It 비인칭 주어 It 4 o' clock
> 정답: 대명사 It

---

**04.** 다음 우리말과 일치하도록 문장을 쓸 때 사용하지 않는 단어를 고르시오.
여기서 거기까지 약 30분 걸려. 대명사 It takes about 30 minutes 비인칭 주어 It
> 정답: 대명사 It

---

**05.** 다음 우리말과 일치하도록 문장을 쓸 때 사용하지 않는 단어를 고르시오.
그것은 공정한 시합이 아니었어. 대명사 It a fair match. 비인칭 주어 It wasn't
> 정답: 비인칭 주어 It

---

**06.** 다음 문장의 it과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
It is July 10th.
You can use it if you want.
It is about 3 kilometers from your school.
She likes it, because it is red.
Please put it back in my bag after class.
> 정답: It is about 3 kilometers from your school.

---

**07.** 다음 문장의 it과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
She wrote it in Korean.
It was his mistake.
It was time to go to school.
It is Tuesday morning.
It was too bright at noon.
> 정답: It was his mistake.

---

**08.** 아래 문장에서 it 의 쓰임을 표시하시오. 대명사 it / 비인칭 주어 it It was Saturday and it was snowing outside. So, they watched a movie at home, but it was not interesting.
